short_summary: Iran deal delayed; Tren de Aragua leader killed
rationale: For a US resident, Iran's contradiction of Trump's Sunday signing claim is the top story — it introduces uncertainty into a major foreign policy announcement, while the Tren de Aragua airstrike confirms a new pattern of military action against foreign criminal organizations on US soil.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt on timing
top_events.summary: Iran's official contradiction of Trump's Sunday signing announcement creates public uncertainty around a major foreign policy deal that could affect oil prices and US military posture in the Middle East.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in airstrike, Trump says
top_events.summary: The confirmed killing of the Tren de Aragua leader in a US airstrike marks a continuation of the administration's use of military force against foreign criminal organizations — a domestic security and policy story for US residents.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: Anthropic's continued suspension of AI tools due to federal security concerns reflects ongoing US government intervention in the AI sector, relevant to tech workers and consumers.
